items.name: Starla Moore / The Handmade Alphas
items.notes: Perfect fit - highly technical Etsy seller educator who focuses on data-driven optimization. 100K-116K subscribers. Works closely with eRank.

items.name: Dylan Jahraus
items.notes: Built $10M business without ads. 116K subscribers, 5,700+ students. Posts 2 videos per week, has podcast Etsy Seller Success with nearly 1M downloads.

items.name: Gold City Ventures (Julie Berninger & Cody Berman)
items.notes: Built $1M+ business teaching Etsy printables. 50K-70K subscribers, 68K email subscribers. Students earned $3.3M+ selling printables. Perfect fit for sizing/quality education.

items.name: Kara Buntin / Artisan Shopper
items.notes: 30K-40K subscribers. 25+ years home business experience, 50K+ sales on Etsy. Published author (Keyword Tracker for Etsy Sellers). Weekly live chats on Tuesdays.

items.name: Nancy Badillo
items.notes: 40K-50K subscribers. 6+ years Etsy experience, 13 years digital marketing. Massive video library (1,200+ videos) with highly engaged educational audience.

items.name: Cassie Smallwood
items.notes: 20K-30K subscribers. Former preschool teacher creating kid-focused printables. Teaches cross-platform marketing (YouTube + Etsy). Strong focus on visual content.

items.name: Renae Christine
items.notes: 40K-60K subscribers. 2.5M+ YouTube views, answered 200K+ questions. Six-figure stationery business. #1 Amazon bestselling author, featured in Huffington Post, ABC, NBC, Fox.

items.name: Mei Pak
items.notes: 40K subscribers. High-caliber educator - taught on CreativeLive alongside Seth Godin, Sophia Amoruso. Grew to 40K subscribers in one year. Focus on creative entrepreneurs.

items.name: RJ Martinez
items.notes: 50K-70K subscribers. Strong POD focus - Print on demand education, Merch by Amazon, Etsy POD, Redbubble. Active Patreon community. His audience creates print designs that need proper sizing.

items.name: Paul Xavier / Next Level Creators
items.notes: 125K subscribers. Teaches commercial video production and digital courses. Co-founder with Anthony Gallo, $2.5M+ in course sales. Audience creates visual content needing proper sizing.

items.name: Pam Duthie / Etsy Nerd
items.notes: 15K-25K subscribers. Niche educator (needle-felted art) who understands product photography and presentation. Shows behind-the-scenes creation process. Twitter @benmcfuzzylugs.

items.name: Sadie Smiley / Passive Income Pathways
items.notes: 30K-40K subscribers. Veteran blogger since 1999 with established credibility. Teaches passive income via digital products. Has Facebook group and blog with extensive Etsy content.

items.name: T / hey.itsteaa
items.notes: 300K+ TikTok followers. Business strategist who scaled to $500K+ in 2 years. Teaches Print on demand, Etsy + Printify tutorials, Canva design. Massive audience actively creating POD products.

items.name: pixelsbyteaa
items.notes: 50K-80K TikTok followers. Technical focus on AI art and digital products, Etsy digital downloads, Printify tutorials. Tech-savvy audience that cares about file quality and DPI.

items.name: Gold City Ventures (TikTok)
items.notes: 40K-60K TikTok followers. Same founders as YouTube channel (Julie & Cody). Cross-platform presence with weekly livestreams. Also active on YouTube, Facebook, Instagram.

items.name: Chelsea Shelton / Gold City Ventures Student
items.notes: Former elementary teacher, Etsy and Teachers Pay Teachers seller. Writes guides for Gold City Ventures. 11K+ Etsy sales. Direct expertise in sizing problem - wrote art print sizing guide.

items.name: Rachel Jones / Side Hustle Nation Featured
items.notes: Etsy printables entrepreneur averaging $10K+/month in sales. Started 2018, full-time 2021. Highly successful case study in major publication. Could be strong testimonial partner.

items.name: Courtney (Gold City Ventures Student)
items.notes: Former TV personality turned mom of 4. Etsy printables seller with 12K+ sales. Completed E-Printables course 2021. Success story - mom of 4 angle resonates with target audience.

items.name: Caitlin Bacher / Little Farm Media
items.notes: 10K-20K subscribers. Social media strategist for creative entrepreneurs, Instagram marketing, Etsy branding. CreativeLive instructor. Strong need for proper image sizing across platforms.

items.name: Giggles Galore
items.notes: 15K-25K subscribers. Former marketing consultant, Dallas-based blogger since 2009. Strong visual content focus. Markets on YouTube and Etsy - perfect for cross-promotion. Etsy shop: gigglesgalorenmore
